description_long: This is a large, rectangular cabinet with a dark, almost black-green finish, featuring a combination of drawers and double doors. The left side of the front face is equipped with five horizontal drawers, each with a rectangular handle, while the right side has two vertically aligned doors with matching handles. The surface appears to be made of wood or a wood-like material, possibly with a veneer or laminate finish, giving it a subtle marbled texture. The cabinet stands on a low, recessed base, providing stability and a slight elevation from the ground. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or decorative elements. This piece is suitable for storage in urban environments such as offices, garages, or apartment hallways.
description: A large, dark-finished cabinet with five drawers and two doors, featuring rectangular handles and a subtle marbled texture. The design is sturdy and functional, ideal for storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: The front view shows five drawers on the left and two doors on the right, all with rectangular handles.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, solid panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: The back view displays a featureless, flat surface with the same dark finish as the rest of the cabinet.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the profile of the drawers and doors, with the handles slightly protruding.
